Name: FTimelineLinearColorTrack
Description: Struct that contains one entry for each linear color interpolation performed by the timeline

Variables.Name: TrackName
Variables.Description: Name of track, usually set in Timeline Editor. Used by SetInterpLinearColorCurve function.

Variables.Name: LinearColorPropertyName
Variables.Description: Name of property that we should update from this curve

Variables.Name: LinearColorProperty
Variables.Description: Cached linear color struct property pointer
